name: Seek Limited
analysis: SEK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$13.6300, stop A$12.4542, target A$15.2500 (1.38:1) — then trail it.
